source_pr.title: *: implement the TxnHeartBeat API for the large transaction
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

In the implementation of the large transaction, a large transaction may last for a long time, during which we must ensure that the lock of the transaction will not been cleaned up.

So we need a new API in the kvproto to update the TTL of a transaction, namely `TxnHeartBeat`.

### What is changed and how it works?

Implement the TxnHeartBeat API in the mocktikv, add the unit test.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test


Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR implements `TxnHeartBeat` support (mocktikv + related code) and includes dependency metadata updates. The case data does not include a concrete intermittent failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix, so avoid guessing a migration-related root cause and keep it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
